Hero.promptPurpose: Create a dynamic hero section for a saas landing page. It should have a strong headline, a subheading, and a primary CTA button. The hero should have an animated background or gradient that moves. Include a paragraph of text. Incorporate floating elements like badges or icons that are animated. Style: modern, clean, and professional.

Features.promptPurpose: Design a features section with animated cards. Each card should have an icon, title, description, and a hover effect that makes it raise or expand. Create 3-6 cards. Use a grid layout. Cards should have a subtle shadow and border-radius. Add a small animation on scroll entry (fade-in or slide-up).

Testimonials.promptPurpose: Create a testimonials section with animated cards. Each card should have a quote, customer name, title, and rating. Use a carousel or grid layout. Cards should have a hover effect that scales up slightly. Include animated quote marks.

Cta.promptPurpose: Design a call-to-action section with an animated background. It should have a bold headline, subheading, and a primary CTA button. The background should have a gradient that moves or changes. Include small animations on button hover.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a clean footer with multiple columns: company logo, description, quick links, social media areas, newsletter signup, and copyright notice. Use a light background with dark text. Add subtle hover effects on links. Responsive layout that stacks on mobile.
